allow: PowerShell($job = Start-Job { Set-Location D:/Projects/Portfolio; npx astro dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4321 }; Start-Sleep 8; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:4321" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).StatusCode } catch { "not ready: $_" })

PowerShell(\(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:4321/pl/" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | Select-String -Pattern "Fraunces|Outfit|placeholder-lines|fonts\\.googleapis" -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches } | Group-Object Value | Select-Object Count, Name)

PowerShell($roots = @\("C:\\Users\\sitka","D:\\","C:\\Users\\sitka\\Documents","C:\\Users\\sitka\\OneDrive"\); foreach \($r in $roots\) { if \(Test-Path $r\) { Get-ChildItem -Path $r -Recurse -Directory -Filter ".obsidian" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 4 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Parent | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName } })

PowerShell($p = "D:\\obsidian\\pponikiewski\\.obsidian"; if \(Test-Path "$p\\plugins\\obsidian-local-rest-api"\) { Write-Output "PLUGIN INSTALLED" } else { Write-Output "PLUGIN MISSING" }; Write-Output "--- community-plugins.json ---"; if \(Test-Path "$p\\community-plugins.json"\) { Get-Content "$p\\community-plugins.json" } else { Write-Output "none" }; Write-Output "--- obsidian process ---"; $proc = Get-Process Obsidian -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { Write-Output "RUNNING" } else { Write-Output "NOT RUNNING" })

PowerShell([System.Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = {$true}; $key = "7aa6798525da5f2ba8ac5a3d052ee9172e2b42eb676a7179a92bedc8d1442c08"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://127.0.0.1:27124/" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $key"} -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("HTTPS OK status=" + $r.StatusCode\); Write-Output $r.Content } catch { Write-Output \("HTTPS FAIL: " + $_.Exception.Message\) })

PowerShell($env:OBSIDIAN_API_KEY="7aa6798525da5f2ba8ac5a3d052ee9172e2b42eb676a7179a92bedc8d1442c08"; $env:NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED="0"; $job = Start-Job { $env:OBSIDIAN_API_KEY=$using:env:OBSIDIAN_API_KEY; $env:NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED="0"; npx -y mcp-obsidian 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep 18; Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job -Force)

PowerShell(cd D:\\Projects\\Portfolio; $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\("src\\i18n\\content.ts"\); $lines = $content -split "`n"; for \($i = 54; $i -le 70; $i++\) { Write-Host "$\($i+1\): $\($lines[$i]\)" | Out-String; [byte[]]$bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($lines[$i]\); $nonAscii = $bytes | Where-Object { $_ -gt 127 }; if \($nonAscii.Count -gt 0\) { Write-Host "  NON-ASCII bytes: $\($nonAscii -join ', '\)" } })
